hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE 'rm.*(spendly\.db|\.env|migrations)' && { echo 'BLOCKED: sensitive project file (db, env, or migrations) — deletion not allowed via Claude' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) /Users/prata/Desktop/projects/expense-tracker/venv/bin/black -q "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
